name: SlovoLom
description: SlovoLom - is an exciting word puzzle , in which you need to make new words from one big word. What awaits you: - training your attention, logic, and vocabulary - Dozens of levels with gradually increasing difficulty - Convenient and intuitive controls - Relaxed gameplay without a timer The game is perfect for both short gaming sessions and long playthroughs.
instructions: The goal of the game to make new words from a large source word Rules - At the beginning of the level you will see one large word - Use only letters from this word - Do not add extra letters - Tap on the letters in the correct order to form a word
